characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Driven to Suicide: In chapter 105 it's revealed that all reapers were humans who committed suicide.

characters.name: Alan Humphries
characters.description: Driven to Suicide: In chapter 105 it's revealed that all reapers were humans who committed suicide.

characters.name: Eric Slingby
characters.description: Driven to Suicide: In chapter 105 it's revealed that all reapers were humans who committed suicide. Foil: To Sebastian, no less. Lampshaded by Sebastian himself in a song:A miserable Shinigami repeats lies and sins / to save a single soul,An approaching demon follows the orders / to devour a single soul Love Makes You Crazy: He kill innocent humans in order to help lift Alan's curse.

characters.name: Stella Rose
characters.description: Aristocrats Are Evil: A rare subversion. Blonde, Brunette, Redhead: If one interprets her hair colour as light brown instead of dark blonde, Stella is the brunette to Lizzie's blonde and Lorraine's redhead. Driven to Suicide: She and her father died in a double-suicide,except not really. It was actually a murder and, while it's not explained very well in-game, either Stella somehow never really died and instead her spirit just separated from her body for a while or she was actually killed but after a time was able to return to her preserved body and come back to life. Good Wears White: For most of the game, not includingthe time spent inhabiting Elizabeth's body, although that could also count as the dress Elizabeth wore most often was predominantly white (but appeared light pink from a distance due to sporting a multitude of thin dark pink stripes) and was accompanied by a pair of white gloves. Hair of Gold, Heart of Gold: Has dark blonde hair and is one of the most kind-hearted characters to have shown up in anyBlack Butlermedia.

characters.name: Patrick
characters.description: Battle Butler: Alongside Sebastian, Patrick takes on a group of armed men and holds them off without injury. Ironic Name: Patrick means 'nobleman'. This particular Patrick is theservantof a nobleman.

characters.name: NormanMcDowell
characters.description: Fat Bastard: Quite the obnoxious character and overweight. Towards the end of the game, hehas a group of men open fire on Ciel and company when it's revealed Lorraine is the murderer. When that fails, he takes Ciel hostage. High-Class Glass: Inverted. Similar to Tanaka, Norman is the (former) steward of the Roses and is not himself an aristocrat or particularly wealthy. Would Hurt a Child:Takes Ciel hostageshortly after his men are mowed down by Sebastian and Patrick.

characters.name: LorraineMcDowell
characters.description: Bitch in Sheep's Clothing: Presenting herself as polite and humble, young MissMcDowellseems very pleasant all-round.But it was her who killed Stella and Viscount Rose. Blonde, Brunette, Redhead: The redhead to Stella's brunette and Lizzie's blonde. Cool Big Sis: Stella has thought of Lorraine this way ever since they were young children, even outright addressing her as 'sister'.It is not reciprocated. Green and Mean: The only outfit she is seen wearing is a predominantly green dress with white stripes. She also wears a dark green bow in her hair. Love Makes You Crazy: Not her entire motivation, but her love for Patrick is partly whyshe killed the Roses.

characters.name: Viscount Rose
characters.description: Aristocrats Are Evil: Perhaps not outright evil, but Lorraine certainly paints him in a cruel light and she seems sincere when doing so. Also, he's implied to have served Victoria in a similar role to the Phantomhives; perhaps he was one of the Villainous Nobles? Asshole Victim: Lorraine has mentioned that the viscount's punishments were hellish. Blue Blood: Was the Viscount of Rose before his death. Everyone Calls Him "Barkeep": Only ever referred to by his title, Viscount Rose.

characters.name: Lord Ridley
characters.description: Ambiguous Innocence: Is a business partner of Lau's. According to him, Ridley is very strait-laced and not involved in anything... untoward, but it's possible Ridley knows of or at least has suspicions regarding Lau's true nature and is simply turning a blind eye. Big Fancy House: He's a rich aristocrat, so of course he has one of these. It serves as the venue of the ball he invites Lau, Lizzie, and Ciel to. Blue Blood: Unlike Viscount Rose, and by extension Stella, his exact status is never specified.
